tagline: Enjoy your pool — Let us handle the work

hero.headline: New England's #1 Pool Experts
hero.subheadline: For over 20 years, MCM Pool Service has kept Massachusetts families swimming in crystal-clear water. Rated #1 in New England by Pool & Spa News — your pool deserves the best.

services.headline: Complete Pool Care, Start to Finish
services.subtitle: From seasonal openings to full liner replacements, we handle every aspect of pool ownership so you can just enjoy the water.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Expert seasonal startup and winterization for in-ground and above-ground pools — done right the first time.

cards.title: Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly and bi-weekly cleaning programs that keep your water sparkling clear and chemically balanced all season.

cards.title: Filter & Pump Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of filtration systems and pumps to restore proper water circulation.

cards.title: Liner Replacement
cards.description: Complete vinyl liner installation for in-ground and above-ground pools, restoring your pool to like-new condition.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Advanced pressure testing and leak detection to pinpoint and resolve water loss issues quickly.

cards.title: Heater & Salt Systems
cards.description: Professional heater installation and salt water conversions to extend your season and improve water quality.

steps.title: Call or Request Online
steps.description: Reach out at 855-626-7665 or fill out our contact form. We'll discuss your pool's needs and schedule a visit.

steps.title: Free On-Site Assessment
steps.description: Our certified technician inspects your pool, identifies any issues, and provides a clear, honest quote.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: We handle the work — you enjoy clean, safe water all season long with zero hassle.

about.label: Locally Owned Since 2003
about.headline: The Team Behind New England's Best Pool Service
about.description: MCM Pool Service was founded with a simple mission: give homeowners a safe, relaxing backyard they can actually enjoy. Over two decades later, we've grown from a one-man operation into the #1 ranked pool company in New England — but we still treat every customer like a neighbor. Our dedicated technicians bring expertise, honesty, and genuine care to every service call across Massachusetts and Rhode Island.
about.badge: #1 Best Overall Pool Company in New England

features.title: 20+ Years of Expertise
features.description: Two decades of hands-on experience with every pool type, earning us the #1 ranking in New England.

features.title: BBB A+ Accredited
features.description: Consistently top-rated since 2013 with a 4.9-star Google rating across 30+ verified reviews.

features.title: No Travel Fees
features.description: We serve 70+ towns and charge zero travel fees for 47 communities across Massachusetts.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is upfront and honest. No hidden fees, no travel charges for 47 towns, and no pressure — just fair pricing for expert pool care.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. With a 4.9-star rating across 30+ reviews and BBB A+ accreditation since 2013, our reputation speaks for itself. We stand behind every service call because your trust is everything to us.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve 70+ towns across Massachusetts and Rhode Island, including Norton, Foxborough, Attleboro, Bridgewater, Brockton, Canton, Easton, Franklin, Mansfield, Taunton, and many more. There's no travel fee for 47 of those communities.

faqs.question: Do you service both in-ground and above-ground pools?
faqs.answer: Yes! We service all pool types — in-ground, above-ground, hot tubs, and spas. Whether you need routine maintenance, repairs, or a full liner replacement, we've got you covered.

faqs.question: How often should I have my pool serviced?
faqs.answer: During swimming season, we recommend weekly or bi-weekly professional maintenance to keep water chemistry balanced and equipment running efficiently. We offer flexible maintenance plans to fit your schedule and budget.

faqs.question: What makes MCM different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're ranked #1 in New England and #12 in the entire U.S. by Pool & Spa News Magazine. With over 20 years of experience, BBB A+ accreditation, and a 4.9-star rating, we bring unmatched expertise and genuine care to every job.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool inspections for home buyers?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide comprehensive pool inspections for home buyers and sellers, checking equipment condition, liner integrity, plumbing, and overall safety so you know exactly what you're getting.

testimonials.name: Robert J.
testimonials.text: Absolutely the best service we ever received on our pool. Very knowledgeable. Great find.

testimonials.name: K.K.
testimonials.text: Every single person I ever speak to at MCM is awesome! I'll never call anyone else.

testimonials.name: Sara Murphy
testimonials.text: Miguel performs meticulous care weekly, is willing to engage to give information, and goes above and beyond to share excellent pool care tips.

contact.headline: Ready to Enjoy Your Pool Again?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch today for a free assessment. No pressure, no obligation — just honest advice from New England's top-rated pool team.

footer.description: MCM Pool Service has been keeping Massachusetts pools crystal clear since 2003. Ranked #1 in New England by Pool & Spa News Magazine, we provide expert maintenance, repair, and installation for pools, hot tubs, and spas.
footer.service_area: Serving Norton, Foxborough, Attleboro, Bridgewater, Brockton, Canton, Easton, Franklin, Mansfield, Taunton, Stoughton, Walpole, Westwood, and 60+ towns across Massachusetts & Rhode Island.
footer.copyright: MCM Pool Service. All rights reserved.
